mapper.insert: INSERT INTO assessment_plan ( plan_id, plan_name, template_id, target_role, start_time, end_time, max_attempts, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{planId}, #{planName}, #{templateId}, #{targetRole}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{maxAttempts}, #{status}, #{createdBy}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE assessment_plan SET plan_name = #{planName}, template_id = #{templateId}, target_role = #{targetRole}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, max_attempts = #{maxAttempts}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE plan_id = #{planId}
mapper.select: SELECT plan_id, plan_name, template_id, target_role, start_time, end_time, max_attempts, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at FROM assessment_plan WHERE plan_id = #{planId}

SELECT plan_id, plan_name, template_id, target_role, start_time, end_time, max_attempts, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at FROM assessment_plan
AND status = #{status}
AND plan_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO assessment_record ( record_id, plan_id, template_id, user_id, status, started_at, submitted_at, answers_json, total_score, dimension_score_json, score_interpretation, risk_level, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{recordId}, #{planId}, #{templateId}, #{userId}, #{status}, #{startedAt}, #{submittedAt}, CAST(#{answersJson} AS JSON), #{totalScore}, CAST(#{dimensionScoreJson} AS JSON), #{scoreInterpretation}, #{riskLevel}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE assessment_record SET status = #{status}, started_at = #{startedAt}, submitted_at = #{submittedAt}, answers_json = CAST(#{answersJson} AS JSON), total_score = #{totalScore}, dimension_score_json = CAST(#{dimensionScoreJson} AS JSON), score_interpretation = #{scoreInterpretation}, risk_level = #{riskLevel}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE record_id = #{recordId}
mapper.select: SELECT record_id, plan_id, template_id, user_id, status, started_at, submitted_at, answers_json, total_score, dimension_score_json, score_interpretation, risk_level, created_at, updated_at FROM assessment_record WHERE record_id = #{recordId}

SELECT record_id, plan_id, template_id, user_id, status, started_at, submitted_at, answers_json, total_score, dimension_score_json, score_interpretation, risk_level, created_at, updated_at FROM assessment_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY submitted_at DESC, created_at DESC
